title: Aluna's Automatic Torches
description: Automatically places torches when light level drops below threshold.
body: Aluna's Automatic Torches automatically places torches from your hotbar when light levels drop below a customizable threshold (default 7) in a 3x3x3 area around you. It consumes torches naturally at your feet or adjacent solid blocks. Toggle it with the 'T' keybind for chat and HUD status. With light threshold, 1-2 block placement range, and 1-4 second cooldown. The mod skips if no torches available. Players experience uninterrupted mining and cave exploration without manual lighting pauses, reducing dark ambushes and speeding progression.
